articles.title: Future of Paxful Bitcoin Exchange in Flux As Co-Founders Fight
articles.description: One wants to resume operation of the marketplace, the other is directing users to an alternative service.

articles.title: Ethereum projects come together on MEV Blocker RPC launch to share profits with users
articles.description: Over 30 Ethereum projects have collaborated to launch MEV Blocker RPC, a tool designed to protect users from various types of MEV attacks.

articles.title: Binance self-custody wallet launches crypto-to-fiat off-ramp
articles.description: Trust Wallet has partnered with MoonPay and Ramp to allow customers to convert their crypto to fiat without using any centralized exchange.

articles.title: BNB Chain prepares for Planck hard fork to enhance cross-chain security
articles.description: The hard fork will focus on implementing the security enhancements proposed in BEP-171, which aim to improve the network's cross-chain bridge.

articles.title: ADA outperforms ETH in key parameter as Charles Hoskinson…
articles.description: The number of unique staking wallets on Cardano was nearly 1.23 million. Ethereum offered a higher staking reward for validators as compared to Cardano. In a tweet shared by Cardano founder Charles Hoskinson, the Cardano [ADA] network was shown to have significantly more unique staking wallets than the largest proof-of-stake network (PoS), Ethereum [ETH]. Read Cardano’s […]
